ocl: context Person inv: age > 0 and age < 80
specification: The age of a person should be greater than 0 and less than 80.

ocl: context Employee inv: employer->isEmpty() xor managedBranch->isEmpty()
specification: An employee must either have no employer or not manage any branches, but not both.
A manager must also be listed as an employee in their own branch.

ocl: context Branch inv: self.employee->forAll(e | e <> self.manager implies self.manager.salary > e.salary)
specification: For every employee in a branch, if the employee is not the manager, then the manager's salary should be higher than that of the employee.

ocl: context CarGroup inv: higher <> self and lower <> self
specification: A CarGroup should not list itself in its 'higher' or 'lower' properties.

ocl: context CarGroup inv: higher.higher <> self and lower.lower <> self
specification: A car group must not be the higher group of its own higher group, and it must not be the lower group of its own lower group.
A car should not have any rentals.
The car group of a rental should be included in the car groups of the branch associated with the rental.
